meta.title: Minthep — Software Engineer
meta.description: Minthep — Software Engineer from Ho Chi Minh City. Full-stack web, mobile, and cloud tooling; English, Japanese, and Korean.

paragraphs: Software Engineering at FPT University (SEP 2022–present, semester 9/9). GPA 8.1/10. Before that, Le Quy Don High School for the Gifted — Chemistry major (2019–2022).

I keep building full-stack products: REST APIs, React and Next.js fronts, mobile with Flutter, and pipelines with Docker and GitHub Actions. I also write on StudyBlog — software topics and Japanese learning — which has picked up 75,000+ views since 2023.
I care about clear requirements, steady delivery, and working across cultures. I am working toward Korean Bridge Engineer roles while growing in enterprise software and Korean business context.

priorEducation.institution: Le Quy Don High School for the Gifted

skills.headline: Languages, frameworks, data stores, delivery — mapped the way I actually use them on repos and coursework.

items.name: Transparent Charity Platform
items.shortDescription: Microservices charity stack with web, mobile, and payments
items.longDescription: Team lead, full-stack, team of four. Architected eight-plus Spring Boot services (API gateway, identity, and more) with Spring Cloud Eureka. Next.js (TypeScript) frontend and GitHub Actions CI/CD. PayOS donations with webhooks. Flutter app (iOS/Android) with real-time chat and campaign management.

items.name: StudyBlog
items.longDescription: Solo full-stack developer. Built and maintained a public writing surface for software engineering notes and Japanese learning (including speaking). Five published articles helping readers with tech and language study.

items.name: GenKiKoi Fish Care
items.shortDescription: Full-stack veterinary platform for Koi — delivered in two months
items.longDescription: Team lead for a four-person team (SEP–NOV 2024). Led delivery of a veterinary platform: Express and MongoDB REST API with five-plus modules (consultation, aquarium inspection, disease treatment and management), React and TypeScript frontend, GitHub Actions pipeline.

items.name: Minthep.com
items.shortDescription: Portfolio and study site — engineering craft in the open
items.longDescription: Personal site combining portfolio presentation with a calm editorial layout. Open source on GitHub with a growing star count from the community.

contact.headline: For collaboration, technical questions, or a clear project brief — email or call works best.
